prompt: I'm building a SaaS project management tool like a simplified Jira. It's just me and one other dev. We want to ship an MVP in 3 months. How should we architect this?

assertions.name: has_constraint_analysis
assertions.description: Explicitly analyzes constraints (team size, timeline, scale, goals) before recommending

assertions.name: has_architectural_style_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends a specific architectural style with reasoning tied to constraints

assertions.name: has_alternatives_considered
assertions.description: Discusses at least one alternative approach and why it's less appropriate here

assertions.name: has_layer_structure
assertions.description: Describes how backend, frontend, and data layers connect

assertions.name: has_cross_cutting_concerns
assertions.description: Addresses at least 2 of: auth, error handling, caching, config

assertions.name: has_actionable_next_steps
assertions.description: Provides concrete next steps or handoff guidance, not just abstract theory
